description: Quadratic Decay-Based Scoring Configuration for Mojo AdCortex Health Scoring System v2.0
note: Uses quadratic decay formulas (1 - 1.5d - 5d²) instead of linear interpolation. Accelerated penalties as metrics drift further from target.

cost._comment: Thresholds for cost metrics (CPL, CPC, CPQL, CPSV) using continuous formula
cost._formula: Score = 100 when ratio≤1.0, interpolates to 40 at red_mult, to 0 at floor_mult
cost._target_comment: Ratio = 1.0 means at target (e.g., CPL = target) → score 100
cost._red_comment: Ratio = 1.5 means 50% over target → score ~50 (RED threshold)
cost._excellent_comment: Minimum score in the excellent range (between 40-99)

budget._comment: Thresholds for budget pacing using continuous formula
budget._formula: Score = 100 at perfect pacing (0% deviation), drops to 50 at red_deviation, to 0 beyond
budget._excellent_comment: Minimum score in the excellent range (between 40-99)

account_level._comment: Google account health score weights (sum should = 100)
Meta account health score weights (sum should = 100)

override_rules._comment_red_metric: If any metric with weight >= this value is RED (< 50), cap final composite to YELLOW
override_rules._comment_red_cap: Maximum composite score when RED override applies

classification._comment: Dual-gate status: GREEN >= 75 AND min_ratio >= 0.40, YELLOW >= 55 AND min_ratio >= 0.20, ORANGE >= 35 AND min_ratio >= 0.05, RED < 35 OR min_ratio < 0.05

notes.migration_v1_to_v2: Migrated from linear interpolation to quadratic decay (1 - 1.5d - 5d²). Penalties accelerate as metrics drift further from target, reflecting real-world urgency.
notes.dual_gate_system: v2.0 introduces dual-gate status: composite score + weakest-link veto. Prevents a single weak metric from hiding behind strong overall performance.
notes.creative_health_upgrade: Creative score now uses spend-weighted average + diversity factor instead of simple unweighted average. Concentrates risk is penalized.
notes.status_bands_changed: YELLOW threshold raised from 50 to 55. New ORANGE status level at 35. Mapping: GREEN=WINNER, YELLOW=WATCH, ORANGE=WATCH, RED=UNDERPERFORMER.
notes.backward_compatibility: Scores will change significantly from v1.0 (especially for metrics 20-30% over target). Thresholds tuned for business intent alignment.
